subject: Alolan Dugtrio — three mole-like Pokémon heads emerging from rocky earth, each with a distinctive flowing golden hair tuft
description: Three rounded mole-like heads protrude from a rocky earthy mound in close formation, each crowned with a large flowing lock of golden hair. The clay-sculpted rendering style gives the figures a handmade, tactile quality. The background is blurred natural ground and warm indirect light. The hair is clearly and distinctly golden — the key visual marker confirming the Alolan regional form rather than the standard Kantonian Dugtrio. The grouped arrangement and shared rocky base reinforce the trio's unified identity.
foreground: Three mole-like heads with golden hair emerging from a rocky mound
background: Blurred earthy natural ground, warm light
